response.step_by_step_log: Identified three song segments. 1. 'Phony' by Tsumiki. 2. 'Way 2 U' by Ouro Kronii. 3. 'Villain' by Teniwoha. Performer is Ouro Kronii for all. Used simplified search strings: '"[Title]" [Artist] Japanese and English lyrics' for covers, and '"[Title]" [Artist] English lyrics' for the original song. Retrieved lyrics via search results.
response.global_summary: A video medley performed by virtual YouTuber Ouro Kronii, featuring covers of 'Phony' and 'Villain', as well as an original song 'Way 2 U'. The performances are interspersed with narrative dialogue.

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii and another character perform a cover of 'Phony' on a stage with a magical, dark-purple aesthetic. Song title and hashtag appear on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
この世で造花より綺麗な花はないわ
なぜならば全ては嘘でできている
Antipathy world
絶望の雨はあたしの傘を突いて
湿らす前髪と心の裏面
煩わしいわ
いつしか言の葉はとうに枯れ切って
言の身があたしに熟れている
さようならまたねと呟いた
フォニイ
嘘に絡まっているあたしは
フォニイ
造花だけが知っている秘密の
フォニイ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
There's no flower in this world more beautiful than an artificial one
That's because everything is manufactured from lies
Antipathy world.
The rain of despair clings to my umbrella
Before I realize it, my bangs and the back of my heart
It's deceptive.
Only understanding the fake flowers, secret phony
I mumbled out the words "farewell, see ya"
The me who's here, entangled in all of these lies, is phony

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii performs her original song 'Way 2 U'. Title and credits appear on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Lately I realized I would never be, never be alone
It was always right in front of me
Do you know? Do you remember, remember
How we used to be so carefree?
I can feel the rain wash over us, yeah
Can you hear my heart like thunder?
Upside down
I got to make a move, make a move
So far I cannot break through the cage I'm in
I don't know how to reach for you
Hardly ever get a chance to speak alone
Could it ever be, can't you feel it too
Side by side, we could laugh all through our days
Baby, just let me make my way to you

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii performs a cover of 'Villain' inside a cage on stage. Song title and credits appear on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
きっと手をつなぐだけでぞっとされる
ラッとレース一抜けたら通報される
ミュータントじゃないただの僕さ
XとかYとか
べき論者様は善悪多頭飼い
僕が君を“侵害”するって言いふらしてる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I'm sure we freak them out just by holding hands
You're reported when you opt out of the "rat race"
I'm not a mutant; I'm just me
Whether that's X or Y.
The moralists are saying that good and evil are irrelevant
They're spreading the rumor that I'm "violating" you
